Case Study • Various

How we helped Granules India Achieves EcoVadis Gold Medal with ESG Advisory Support from Growlity

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Granules India Ltd., a global pharmaceutical manufacturer renowned for its commitment to quality and responsibility, has been awarded the prestigious EcoVadis Gold Medal. This places Granules India among the top 5% of over 130,000 companies worldwide rated by EcoVadis — the leading global standard for business sustainability ratings.

Granules India’s performance was exceptional across all four EcoVadis categories:

  • Environment: 78/100
  • Labour & Human Rights: 74/100
  • Ethics: 84/100
  • Sustainable Procurement: 83/100

This remarkable achievement reflects Granules India’s unwavering focus on Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles and was made possible through a structured sustainability roadmap developed in collaboration with Growlity, Inc. USA — a global ESG and sustainability consulting firm.

Mr. Sanjay Kumar, Chief Strategy & Sustainability Officer, Granules India Ltd. said:
“Receiving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a proud milestone in our sustainability journey, reflecting our focused efforts to embed ESG principles across the organization. We appreciate Growlity support in translating our vision into an actionable framework, benchmarking our progress globally, and aligning with stakeholder expectations. They also helped us strengthen our disclosures during the assessment process.”

Mr. Prabhat Pant, Vice President – Global Market Development, Growlity, added:
“Granules India’s achievement reflects the power of focused strategy, strong leadership, and collaborative execution. From the beginning, their clarity of vision and commitment to structured ESG transformation made this partnership effective. It’s gratifying to see their efforts recognized by EcoVadis, affirming their role as a responsible and forward-thinking leader in the global pharmaceutical space.”

About Granules India Ltd.

Granules India is a globally integrated pharmaceutical company based in Hyderabad, India. It manufactures APIs, PFIs, and finished dosages for regulated and semi-regulated markets across more than 75 countries. With innovation, quality, and sustainability at its core, Granules India is committed to advancing healthcare through responsible business practices.

About Growlity

Growlity is a globally trusted ESG and sustainability advisory firm operating in 25+ countries. Growlity supports organizations with solutions across EcoVadis, CDP, BRSR, CBAM, LCA, PCF, and other global sustainability frameworks. The firm’s mission is to drive measurable ESG impact, transparency, and competitive advantage for businesses worldwide
